Title: __xml_nsexpand_iristr
Description:
Checks if the string is QName and if it is so then replaces namespace prefix to the
    	full namespace IRI.

Checks if the string is QName and if it is so then replaces namespace prefix to the
    	full namespace IRI. Otherwise signals error if the argument is local IRI without a prefix.
Examples:
SQL> SELECT __xml_nsexpand_iristr ('foaf:knows');
__xml_nsexpand_iristr
VARCHAR
http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/knows
1 Rows. -- 0 msec.
